text:
Sections 29004 and 29005 shall not apply to trailers or dollies used to support booms attached to truck cranes if the following conditions are met:

(a) The trailer or dolly is connected to the boom by a pin, coupling device, or fifth wheel assembly.

(b) The trailer is secured to the boom with a chain, cable, or equivalent device of sufficient strength to control the trailer or dolly in case of failure of the connection consisting of a pin, coupling device, or fifth wheel assembly.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 13. TOWING AND LOADING EQUIPMENT [29000 - 31560]
### Chapter 1. Towing Equipment [29000 - 29009]
##### § 29008

Sections 29004 and 29005 shall not apply to trailers or dollies used to support booms attached to truck cranes if the following conditions are met:

(a) The trailer or dolly is connected to the boom by a pin, coupling device, or fifth wheel assembly.

(b) The trailer is secured to the boom with a chain, cable, or equivalent device of sufficient strength to control the trailer or dolly in case of failure of the connection consisting of a pin, coupling device, or fifth wheel assembly.

*(Amended by Stats. 2006, Ch. 538, Sec. 664. Effective January 1, 2007.)*

subsections.text: Sections 29004 and 29005 shall not apply to trailers or dollies used to support booms attached to truck cranes if the following conditions are met:

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The trailer or dolly is connected to the boom by a pin, coupling device, or fifth wheel assembly.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The trailer is secured to the boom with a chain, cable, or equivalent device of sufficient strength to control the trailer or dolly in case of failure of the connection consisting of a pin, coupling device, or fifth wheel assembly.

history.raw: (Amended by Stats. 2006, Ch. 538, Sec. 664. Effective January 1, 2007.)
